language_picker_prompt: Выберите язык / Тилди тандаңыз / Choose language:
language_set_ok: Language set: English. Use /report to submit a dumpsite report.
welcome: Hello! This is the EcoMonitor bot for reporting unauthorized dumpsites in Bishkek. Use /report to start.
help:
Available commands:
/report - submit a dumpsite report
/status - check status of your reports
/language - change language
/cancel - cancel current action
/help - this help
report_ask_description: Please describe the dumpsite in 10-1000 characters. Where is it, what kind of waste, how big?
report_description_too_short: Description too short. Need at least 10 characters. Try again.
report_description_too_long: Description too long. Maximum 1000 characters. Shorten and send again.
report_ask_photos: Now please send 1-5 photos of the dumpsite. When done, send /done.
report_max_photos_reached: Maximum 5 photos. Send /done to proceed or /cancel to start over.
report_need_at_least_one_photo: Need at least one photo. Send a photo or /cancel.
report_ask_location: Please share the location of the dumpsite. Tap the button below.
report_submitted: Report submitted! Reference ID: {0}. Track status with /status.
status_no_reports: You have no reports yet. Use /report to submit your first one.
error_unknown_state: Something went wrong. Start over with /report.
error_send_text_not_photo: Expected text description, not a photo. Describe the dumpsite in words.
error_send_photo_not_text: Expected a photo. Send a photo or /done if finished.
error_send_location_not_text: Expected location. Tap the "Send location" button.
info_use_report_to_start: Use /report to submit a new report.
notif_report_confirmed: ✅ Your report {0} has been confirmed by an inspector and sent to the cleanup crew.
notif_report_rejected: ❌ Your report {0} was rejected. Check /status for details.
notif_cleanup_started: 🧹 The cleanup crew has started work on report {0}.
notif_cleanup_completed: 📸 Cleanup of report {0} is complete. Awaiting inspector verification.
notif_report_resolved: 🎉 Report {0} is now closed. Thank you for helping keep Bishkek clean!
